title: Dog Soldiers (2002)
plot_summary: 'Dog Soldiers' follows a group of British soldiers on a training mission in the Scottish Highlands who encounter a pack of werewolves. As they fight for survival against the deadly creatures, the soldiers must rely on their training, camaraderie, and resourcefulness to outwit the supernatural foes. title: Duel (1971)
plot_summary: Duel is an American television film that follows a businessman named David who encounters a mysterious and relentless tanker truck driver on a remote highway. As David tries to escape the driver's attacks, a tense and suspenseful cat-and-mouse game ensues. Directed by Steven Spielberg in his feature-length directorial debut, Duel is a gripping thriller that showcases Spielberg's skill in building tension and suspense.
